params.script:
TASK=$(cat); ${TROUPE:-pnpm dlx @barnum/troupe} submit_task --pool $BARNUM_POOL --root $BARNUM_ROOT --notify file --data "$(jq -n --arg inst 'Make a decision. Choose either PathA or PathB.

Return one of:
- `[{"kind": "PathA", "value": {}}]`
- `[{"kind": "PathB", "value": {}}]`' --argjson task "$TASK" '{task: $task, instructions: $inst}')" | jq -r '.stdout'

TASK=$(cat); ${TROUPE:-pnpm dlx @barnum/troupe} submit_task --pool $BARNUM_POOL --root $BARNUM_ROOT --notify file --data "$(jq -n --arg inst 'You chose path A. Proceed to Done.

Return: `[{"kind": "Done", "value": {}}]`' --argjson task "$TASK" '{task: $task, instructions: $inst}')" | jq -r '.stdout'

TASK=$(cat); ${TROUPE:-pnpm dlx @barnum/troupe} submit_task --pool $BARNUM_POOL --root $BARNUM_ROOT --notify file --data "$(jq -n --arg inst 'You chose path B. Proceed to Done.

Return: `[{"kind": "Done", "value": {}}]`' --argjson task "$TASK" '{task: $task, instructions: $inst}')" | jq -r '.stdout'

TASK=$(cat); ${TROUPE:-pnpm dlx @barnum/troupe} submit_task --pool $BARNUM_POOL --root $BARNUM_ROOT --notify file --data "$(jq -n --arg inst 'All done. Return an empty array.

Return: `[]`' --argjson task "$TASK" '{task: $task, instructions: $inst}')" | jq -r '.stdout'
